debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
primes : List ℕ
h_precond : findExponents_precond n primes
⊢ findExponents_postcond n primes (findExponents n primes h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
sorry
  · induction primes generalizing n
    · cases h_precond; contradiction
    · rename_i p ps ih
      simp [findExponents.countFactors]
      constructor
      · exact List.mem_cons_self p ps
      · intro q hq
        exact List.mem_cons_of_mem p (ih (by
          rcases h_precond with ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4⟩
          exact ⟨h1, by simp at h2; admit, by simp at h3; exact h3.2, by simp at h4; exact h4.2⟩) hq)
  · induction primes generalizing n
    · cases h_precond; contradiction
    · rename_i p ps ih
      simp [findExponents.countFactors]
      constructor
      · exists p
      · intro q hq
        specialize ih (by
          rcases h_precond with ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4⟩
          exact ⟨h1, by simp at h2; admit, by simp at h3; exact h3.2, by simp at h4; exact h4.2⟩)
        simp [ih]
        right
        exact hq

sorry
    | p :: ps =>
      simp [findExponents.countFactors]
      sorry
  exact countFactors_spec n primes h_precond.1 h_precond.2.2.1
